content: Winterhold Guard: Fuck this cold. You see that bandit camp near the coast? Bunch of Rieklings riding mammoth cocks like they own the place. Disgusting little shits. Winterhold Guard 2: Pfft, at least the Rieklings aren’t as bad as those Draugr fuckers down in the ruins. Bastards don’t even bother pulling their pants down before they skull-fuck their victims. Makes me wanna puke. Winterhold Guard: Yeah, well, at least the Draugr don’t whine like those damn Forsworn. Last raid, I caught one of their bitches begging for it after I gutted her friend. Pathetic. Winterhold Guard 2: Hah! Should’ve seen the last group of Imperials we took down near Dawnstar. Those prissy milk-drinkers screamed like virgins when we showed ‘em what real Nords do to prisoners. Bet they’re still limping.

Winterhold Guard: Heh, sounds like you had fun. But fuck it, I’m freezing my balls off out here. Should’ve stayed in the barracks with that new Redguard whore warming my bed. Winterhold Guard 2: Pah, you wish. That slag wouldn’t touch your shriveled cock even if you paid her in dragon bones. Stop dreaming and keep your eyes on the damn road.
